MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER DENNIS J. PETTINELLI'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
